pass_condition: Family fixes the complete field/operator content used by the claimed branch.
Family has a native UDT action/variation or other native equation authority, not a conditional/imported/posited law.
Family supplies a solution of its complete native equations, not only an off-shell metric witness, local jet, ansatz, or kinematic atlas.
Family supplies a global integral rank-two angular torus where the exchange is claimed, with periods and lattice identified.
Family specifies one global exchange lift on the actual angular/coframe data.
The specified exchange squares to identity; identity and order-four lifts do not pass.
The exchange is preserved by the actual branch cocycle/monodromy, not merely by a local chart.
Family supplies the branch's actual primitive cap/isotropy cycles or an exact equivalent.
The involution preserves or compatibly exchanges the actual cap/isotropy data; if Hopf completion is claimed the registered FC04 determinant condition is met.
Family supplies a complete regular finite-cell boundary/seal/cap completion.
Affirmative physics authority descends from the July-1 native metric foundation.
No carrier posit, GR comparison, conventional action, or other imported premise is relabeled native.
